title: USDA Wants to Hear from Stakeholders about Statistical Programs
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) announces the annual USDA Data Users’ Meeting. The meeting is free of charge and open to anyone interested in learning about recent and pending changes in various data and information programs important to agri...

title: Smoke Dance
summary: Subsistence is a huge component of what it means to be an Alaska Native. Every year at our Nuuciq Spirit Camp, our Elders pass along subsistence knowledge and skills to our youth, keeping the Chugach culture alive. In this short video, Diane Selanoff teaches camp attendees one of our tastiest tradit...
